basis: the round needs graph, flow, contradiction, and solution-set outputs
the problem already exceeds base-chain depth
the round needs export-ready serialized outputs
downstream consumers want XML and Mermaid views

reasons: The system requires resource graph, actor network, flow analysis, contradiction analysis, and a solution set.
The round is not satisfiable with base artifacts only.
The final advanced outputs must also be exported into serialized representations.
The representation layer must consume stable advanced artifacts rather than raw prose.

advanced_mode.if_missing: loop back to demand_constraint_modeling or branch_plan_generation depending on the missing advanced artifact
advanced_mode.why: advanced outputs depend on stable system modeling layers

representation_and_serialization_mode.if_missing: loop back to branch_plan_generation or loop_or_finish depending on the missing export target
representation_and_serialization_mode.why: representation should follow stable advanced artifacts

mode_precedence.precedence_basis: representation serializes advanced outputs and cannot redefine their semantics
mode_precedence.note: Advanced artifacts remain the semantic source of truth.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Provide stable participants and interaction order for Mermaid export.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: The sequence diagram may become decorative or semantically detached.

cross_mode_handoffs.handoff_purpose: Provide stable downstream targets for representation-bundle export.
cross_mode_handoffs.conflict_if_missing: Bundle targets may point to an incomplete or pre-solution artifact set.

interaction_notes.active_when: the round needs deep system modeling and export-ready outputs in the same pass
interaction_notes.note: Do not let export get ahead of contradiction analysis or solution-set stabilization.

profile_adjustment_recommendation.adjustment_reason: the default deep autonomous profile fit the round because advanced modeling and downstream export both needed sustained expansion without extra confirmation turns
